skill.name: soultrace
skill.description: Runs an adaptive SoulTrace personality assessment through the SoulTrace API and returns a color-based archetype profile.
skill.summary: Guide users through a 24-question SoulTrace personality assessment and summarize the final archetype results.
skill.author: soultrace-ai

security_audit.summary: Static command execution alerts are false positives from fenced markdown examples and inline code snippets. The real risk is network transmission of personality assessment answers to https://soultrace.app/api/agent, which should be disclosed before use. Weak cryptography and system reconnaissance alerts were not supported by the reviewed lines.

medium_findings.title: Third-Party Personality Data Submission
medium_findings.description: TRUE_POSITIVE: The skill instructs agents to send user assessment answers to the SoulTrace API and to accumulate all prior answers with each request. These answers can reveal personality traits and should be treated as personal data sent to an external service.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: The endpoint and workflow are explicitly documented, and the skill requires sending accumulated answers to the remote API. The risk is privacy exposure, not evidence of malicious exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Markdown Command Examples Flagged As Execution
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The Ruby or shell backtick detections correspond to fenced markdown blocks, inline JSON examples, and API response examples. No executable script file, install hook, or hidden runtime command was found in the reviewed skill.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced lines are markdown documentation and examples, not code that runs automatically. The skill can still cause network requests when an agent follows the documented API flow.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Alert Not Supported
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The flagged lines describe a psychological model and answer collection behavior. No MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, or other weak cryptographic algorithm use was found on those lines.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Direct review of the flagged lines shows personality-assessment text, not cryptographic operations. The finding appears to be a keyword collision.

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Alert Not Supported
low_findings.description: FALSE_POSITIVE: The flagged line is an HTTP error table entry for status 400. It does not request host, user, process, environment, or network interface information.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line only documents an invalid request response. No system enumeration behavior is present in the reviewed file.

dangerous_patterns.title: External API Calls With User-Provided Answers
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill depends on sending each user answer and the accumulated answer history to an external HTTPS endpoint. This is expected behavior for the skill but requires clear user consent and privacy disclosure.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: The file explicitly states that all accumulated answers are sent with every request. The pattern is legitimate for this API workflow but creates a privacy-sensitive data flow.

content.value_statement: Personality assessments can be hard to run consistently inside an AI chat. This skill guides the user through SoulTrace questions and summarizes the final archetype profile.
actual_capabilities: Starts a SoulTrace assessment by calling the documented API endpoint.
Presents each assessment question with a 1 to 7 response scale.
Maps simple descriptive answers to numeric Likert scores.
Accumulates prior answers and sends them with each API request.
Summarizes final archetype, color distribution, top matches, and result link.
limitations: Requires access to the external SoulTrace API.
Sends personality answers to a third-party service.
Does not provide clinical or medical mental health assessment.
Rate limits allow only a few full assessments per hour.

use_cases.title: Personal Reflection Session
use_cases.description: Complete a guided 24-question assessment and receive a color-based archetype summary.

use_cases.title: Coaching Conversation Starter
use_cases.description: Use the archetype results to discuss strengths, blind spots, and preferred working patterns.

use_cases.title: Team Workshop Icebreaker
use_cases.description: Help participants complete the same structured assessment before a non-clinical team discussion.

prompt_templates.title: Start My Assessment
prompt_templates.prompt: Start a SoulTrace personality assessment for me. Ask one question at a time and explain the 1 to 7 scale.

prompt_templates.title: Continue From Answers
prompt_templates.prompt: Continue my SoulTrace assessment using the answers I have already given. Keep collecting one answer per question.

prompt_templates.title: Explain My Results
prompt_templates.prompt: After the assessment is complete, summarize my archetype, color distribution, top matches, and result link in plain language.

prompt_templates.title: Facilitate Group Reflection
prompt_templates.prompt: Run a SoulTrace assessment workflow for a workshop participant and prepare neutral discussion prompts from the final profile.

output_examples.input: I want to take a personality test.
output_examples.output: The assistant starts the SoulTrace assessment, explains the 1 to 7 scale, and presents the first question.
The assistant maps the answer to 7, sends the accumulated answers, and asks the next returned question.
The assistant provides the archetype name, alignment score, color percentages, top matches, and full result page link.

best_practices: Tell users their answers will be sent to the SoulTrace API before starting.
Ask one question at a time and wait for the user response.
Present results as self-reflection, not as clinical or employment guidance.
anti_patterns: Do not answer assessment questions for the user.
Do not skip questions or shorten the assessment workflow.
Do not treat archetype results as medical, hiring, or diagnostic evidence.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It runs a SoulTrace personality assessment and summarizes the resulting color-based archetype profile.

faq.question: Does it require an external service?
faq.answer: Yes. It sends assessment requests to the SoulTrace API endpoint documented in the skill.

faq.question: How many questions are included?
faq.answer: The documented workflow uses 24 answered questions after the initial start request.

faq.question: Can users answer with words instead of numbers?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill maps simple phrases like agree or neutral to the 1 to 7 scale.

faq.question: Is this a clinical assessment?
faq.answer: No. It is a self-reflection personality profile and should not be used as medical advice.

faq.question: What should users know before starting?
faq.answer: Their assessment answers are sent to a third-party API to generate the results.
